# Screenshots

Add PNG captures here to populate the README's Screenshots grid:

| File | Suggested page |
|---|---|
| `discover.png` | `/events` — the discovery / search page |
| `event.png` | `/events/<slug>` — a public event detail page |
| `dashboard.png` | `/organizer/events` — organizer event list |
| `checkin.png` | `/organizer/events/<id>/check-in` — the QR scanner |

Capture at ~1440px wide for crisp rendering, then uncomment the grid block in the
root `README.md` under "## 📸 Screenshots".

Tip: for a combined hero shot, place two screenshots side by side in an image
editor (or use a tool like [shots.so](https://shots.so)) and save as
`hero-combined.png`, then reference it above the grid.
